title: saxifraga stellaris subsp. prolifera
intro: Saxifraga stellaris subsp. prolifera, also known as the Starry Saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Saxifraga stellaris subsp. prolifera include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
